ItacPersonItem.Notes: Not recorded by Maylender as a member of the Infuriati Academy in Naples. For de Castro`s affiliation to the Infuriati Academy see Onofrio de Castro, La Necessità Aguzza lo Ingegno, Napoli, Heredi Roncagliolo, 1670
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
